Document:
# Parasites
[color=#999999][italic]"You will be reborn in a beautiful new form. We are one now."[/italic][/color]
Parasites are an [color=yellowgreen]infectious collective[/color] that want to seize control of the station to turn it into a nest for the parasites to reproduce.
The various parasite masks all fall under the general role type of "jester"-- a mask whose objective it is to be killed.
When hosts of the parasitic infection are killed, the parasites will spring into actions, causing unique effects to occur and potentially infecting others. Note that it has to be another player who takes your life, not the environment or an animal.
However, the hosts themselves are restricted by the very same parasites. If they were to take the life of another, the hormonal spike in their brain would send the parasites into a frenzy, killing them almost instantly.
The parasites win if they seize control of the majority of the station. Note that this only includes living players, so if members of other troupes die off, it's possible for the parasites to win with only relatively few infections.
At that point, a psychic message will be sent, notifying that the parasite swarm will begin shortly. After a short delay, all members will develop parasitic growths on their body and have a large parasite burst from their arm.
This larger worm can be used as a weapon, stunning people on hit and converting prone players in parasitic hosts.
After a few minutes, so long as the rampaging parasites are not wiped out, the round will end as a parasite troupe victory.
